name: Hungarian Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------CHEESECAKE---------------------------------
2 cups Cottage Cheese
4 Large Eggs; Whole
1/4 cup Granulated Sugar
1 teaspoon Lemon Rind; Grated
1 cup Sour Cream
1 cup Crushed Pineapple; Drained (unsweetened)
1/2 cup Raisins
1. Sift together the flour and baking powder, set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter until smooth. Add the egg yolks, salt, and lemon juice, mixing well.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture, alternating with small amounts of cold water as needed to form a dough (about 3-4 tablespoons total).
4. Place the dough on a flat surface and roll out to a thickness of 1/4-inch. Transfer to a greased 9-inch springform pan.
5. Line the sides of the pan with excess dough, then chill.
CHEESECAKE:
6. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
7. Press cottage cheese through a sieve into a large mixing bowl.
8. In the same bowl, beat 3 eggs and sugar until well blended.
9. Add the cottage cheese, beating, then stir in the lemon rind and sour cream.
10. Separate the remaining egg white and brush over the crust.
11. Combine pineapple and raisins; spread evenly on the crust.
12. Pour the cheese mixture over the fruit topping.
13. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F (230°C), then reduce to 350°F (175°C) and bake an additional 35 minutes.
14. Cool to room temperature, then chill before serving.
